nextFrontierProgram: Benchmark Leakage-Risk Detection under Protocol Cards
title: Batch 24 Protocol-Card Kill Week and Next Frontier
whatSovrynLearned: Protocol Cards are useful scientific infrastructure for clear or approximated protocols, but ambiguous cards must be downgraded and the next frontier should test leakage-risk mechanisms behind split deltas.
